2022-23 Gonzaga Bulldogs Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 31-6 (14-2, 1st in WCC MBB)

Rank: 9th in the Final AP Poll

Coach: Mark Few

PS/G: 86.1 (1st of 363)

PA/G: 73.4 (277th of 363)

SRS: 18.98 (9th of 363)

SOS: 8.04 (42nd of 363)

ORtg: 119.5 (2nd of 363)

DRtg: 101.8 (180th of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +900

NCAA Tournament: (#3 seed in West)
Won West First Round (82-70) versus #14 Grand Canyon
Won West Second Round (84-81) versus #6 Texas Christian
Won West Regional Semifinal (79-76) versus #2 UCLA
Lost West Regional Final (82-54) versus #4 Connecticut

  • WCC Reg Season Champ
  • WCC Tourney Champ
